title: Common-Boat
description: When you need that extra POWAH
body:
### Common-Boat

[![CodeFactor](https://www.codefactor.io/repository/github/craftish37/common-boat/badge)](https://www.codefactor.io/repository/github/craftish37/common-boat)

Common-Boat is a simple mod allowing you to override the default speed of boats in different environments. The default should be around the speed on blue ice for all terrains. [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) can be used to access the config in-game. Now using [MaLiLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/malilib)!

This mod shall be installed on both client and server in order to work properly.

Need support ? Join the Discord [here](https://discord.gg/H8xZpfscCg)

[![NeyHost affiliation - Use promo code "CRAFTISH", save 30% on your first purchase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15d6168a8195c89d3ae1c95c2fae55722923e712_0.webp)](https://www.neyhost.com/?ref=CRAFTISH)
